crons.comment: Vercel Hobby plan only allows a single cron firing per day. We pick 06:00 UTC (07:00 PT) so reservations that landed overnight are imported by the time Andre opens the app in the morning. For real-time (every 30 min) capture, either upgrade to Pro or use an external pinger like cron-job.org targeting /api/cron/import-emails with the CRON_SECRET Bearer header.
